machine_model.default_materials: Generic PLA @ULTIMAKER2; Generic PETG @ULTIMAKER2; Generic ABS @ULTIMAKER2
machine_model.name: Ultimaker 2

data.end_gcode:
; # # # # # # START Footer
G91 			; relative coordinates
;G1 E-1 F1200		; retract the filament
G1 Z+15  X-10 Y-10 E-7  F6000		; move Z a bit
; G1 X-10 Y-10 F6000	; move XY a bit
G1 E-5.5 F300		; retract the filament
G28 X0 Y0		; move X/Y to min endstops, so the head is out of the way
M104 S0			; extruder heater off
M140 S0			; heated bed heater off (if you have it)
M84 			; disable motors
; # # # # # # END Footer
data.printer_notes: Dont remove the following keywords! These keywords are used in the "compatible printer" condition of the print and filament profiles to link the particular print and filament profiles to this printer profile.\nPRINTER_VENDOR_ULTIMAKER\nPRINTER_MODEL_ULTIMAKER2
data.start_gcode:
; Printer_Settings_ID: [printer_settings_id]

; # # # # # # START Header
G21 		; metric values
G90 		; absolute positioning
M82 		; set extruder to absolute mode
M107 		; start with the fan off

G28 X0 Y0 Z0	; move X/Y/Z to endstops
G1 X1 Y6 F15000	; move X/Y to start position
G1 Z35 F9000	; move Z to start position

; Heat up bed and nozzle
M190 S{first_layer_bed_temperature[0] - 5}	; wait for bed temperature - 5
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature]	; continue bed heating
M109 S{first_layer_temperature+extruder_temperature_offset}	; wait for nozzle temperature

G92 E0		; zero the extruded length
G1 F150 E22	; purge nozzle with filament
G92 E0		; zero the extruded length again
G1 F75 E7	; additional priming
G92 E0		; zero the extruded length again

; # # # # # # END Header
